headline: Warehouse Accident at Work Preparation Checklist for Boise Idaho Clients
articleBody:
Being prepared for your Warehouse Accident at Work appointment saves time and helps Davis & Sanchez (Just Work Comp Law) deliver the best possible results. Here is what to have ready:

1. Incident report filed with employer — Having this ready before your appointment ensures a smooth, efficient process.
2. Medical records from treating physician — Having this ready before your appointment ensures a smooth, efficient process.
3. Witness statements — Having this ready before your appointment ensures a smooth, efficient process.
4. Employer notification documentation — Having this ready before your appointment ensures a smooth, efficient process.
5. Doctor work restrictions — Having this ready before your appointment ensures a smooth, efficient process.

Call Davis & Sanchez (Just Work Comp Law) at 801-746-0290 to schedule your Warehouse Accident at Work consultation in Boise Idaho. Our team will let you know if any additional documentation is needed for your specific situation.
